message:
feat(pijs): in-memory VFS for node:fs + createRequire builtin resolution (bd-2ej3)

Replace stub-only node:fs with a full in-memory virtual filesystem (__pi_vfs)
that supports real read/write/stat/readdir operations. Enhance createRequire
in node:module to resolve and return actual builtin modules (fs, path, os,
crypto, url, process, buffer, child_process).

This fixes the last Rust-side community conformance failure (nicobailon-mcp-adapter
needed openSync to work with VFS state). Community: 53/58 (91.4%), Official: 60/60.
All 5 remaining failures are TS oracle environment issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
